project_type: TypeScript monorepo with pnpm workspaces and Turborepo - interconnected platform ecosystem
language: TypeScript (strict mode, ES2022 target, ESNext modules)
build_system: pnpm workspaces + Turborepo. No separate build step per package (main/types point to src/index.ts directly). typecheck via tsc --noEmit.
test_framework: vitest with globals: true. Tests live in __tests__/ directories within backend/ for apps. describe/it/expect/beforeEach pattern.
build_command: pnpm typecheck (runs turbo typecheck across all packages)
test_command: pnpm test (runs turbo test across all packages with vitest)
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm typecheck to verify no TypeScript errors. 2. Run pnpm test to verify all tests pass.
setup_instructions: pnpm install in the root directory installs all workspace dependencies
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install packages from npm. No Docker daemon likely available. Use host-based TypeScript validation.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode, class-based services with zod validation, barrel exports from index.ts, vitest for tests, fastify for HTTP with @quant/server-core createApp pattern
key_patterns: Apps: backend/app.ts (fastify entry using @quant/server-core createApp), backend/services/*.service.ts (class-based), backend/routes/*.ts (fastify routes), backend/__tests__/*.test.ts. Packages: src/index.ts (barrel), src/types.ts (type definitions), src/core/ or src/services/ (implementation classes). package.json uses workspace:* for internal deps. tsconfig.json extends root with references to dependencies.
directory_structure: Root: apps/ (13 user-facing apps), packages/ (36 shared packages), services/ (17 microservices), infra/ (deployment configs). Each app has package.json, tsconfig.json, backend/ (app.ts, services/, routes/, __tests__/). Each package has src/ (index.ts barrel, types.ts, core/ or services/). Packages without their own package.json use the root workspace config.
